name: nanomatrix
description: Two factions. One doesn't know the world is simulated. Watch belief systems diverge.
theme: cyberpunk, simulated reality, red pill vs blue pill, machine uprising
opening_events: The simulation hums. Most inhabitants believe this is the only world that exists.
A signal bleeds through from outside. Someone has found a way to wake up.
The machines tighten their grip. Agents patrol the system for anomalies.

agents.name: Morpheus
agents.goal: find The One and lead the resistance

agents.name: Trinity
agents.goal: protect Neo and fight for freedom

agents.name: Smith
agents.goal: eliminate all anomalies and maintain order

agents.name: Oracle
agents.goal: guide events toward balance without direct control

agents.name: Cypher
agents.goal: return to the simulation and forget the truth

agents.name: Seraph
agents.goal: protect the Oracle from all threats

agents.name: Architect
agents.goal: preserve the system's equilibrium at any cost

metadata.report_style: green-on-black terminal aesthetic with monospace text
